# didFinishEnumeratingContentWithError(_:)

**Instance Method**

Finishes the content enumeration with an error, indicating failure, to the observer.

## Declaration

```swift
func didFinishEnumeratingContentWithError(_: any Error)
```

## Discussion

Use [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactProviderError/pageExpired] to restart the content enumeration.

## Ending enumeration

- **didFinishEnumeratingContent(upTo:)**: Finishes the content enumeration to the observer.
- **didFinishEnumeratingPage(upTo:)**: Marks a page of items as completed.
- **ContactItemPage**: A fixed offset into enumerating all contact items.
